subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower of sheer basalt.
source_quote: A tower of sheer basalt

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The top of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning has a glowing green room.
source_quote: at the top had a glowing green room

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The tower was a place of law under the Drow regime.
source_quote: The tower was a place of law under the Drow regime

subject: glowing green room
fact: The green glowing green room is a teleportation circle.
source_quote: The green glowing green room is a teleportation circle

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The Watcher's eye brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades.
source_quote: The brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The Watcher's eye brooch is the seat of government in Mulmaster.
source_quote: the seat of government in Mulmaster

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The Watcher's eye brooch allows the wearer to bypass certain lethal magical defenses designed to vaporize intruders.
source_quote: It allows the wearer to bypass certain lethal magical defenses designed to vaporize intruders

subject: Timepiece of Maram il Vass
fact: The Timepiece of Maram il Vass is an hourglass.
source_quote: An hourglass

subject: Timepiece of Maram il Vass
fact: The Timepiece of Maram il Vass represents the total time available to secure the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: that represents the total time available to secure the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a book that contains information that Maram il Vass requires.
source_quote: A book that contains information that Maram il Vass requires

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is currently possessed by Vraxen.
source_quote: Currently possessed by Vraxen

fact: Solom Ned'razak uses the present tense when speaking of his home.

fact: Solom Ned'razak firmly believes the invaders will be pushed back.

fact: Solom Ned'razak hopes that the ritual is going to be the key that they need to accomplish that goal.

fact: Solom Ned'razak is ruthless and efficient in his dealings.
